CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,695.28 FILED BY LEE DAISY LEE MORGAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CRAWFROD CHRISTINA L R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAWFROD CHRISTINA L R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE DAISY LEE MORGAN $2,408.61 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,416.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEE DAISY LEE MORGAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CRAWFROD CHRISTINA L R STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEE DAISY LEE MORGAN
